citations.quote: Edinburgh Napier University - Payment Confirmation (Ref: ENU447436) ... Paid today: 30.00 (GBP)

findings.text: OCR extraction for source NAP-SRC-0007 (IMG_0304.jpeg) used Tesseract with low confidence (0.65), producing garbled text. Enhanced OCR engine is not yet configured.
Source NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF) extracted via pdf_text with moderate confidence (0.85) but contains OCR artifacts (e.g., garbled characters). Re-extraction may improve quality.
Task TASK-003 is a tool_configuration task; no legal or factual findings can be derived from the provided evidence. The task requires configuring an enhanced OCR engine, not analyzing evidence.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# OCR Re-extraction Configuration Report

## Summary
- **Source NAP-SRC-0007**: Tesseract OCR confidence 0.65, garbled output. Requires enhanced OCR re-extraction.
- **Source NAP-SRC-0005**: pdf_text extraction confidence 0.85, moderate artifacts. Optional re-extraction.

## Recommended Action
Configure an enhanced OCR engine (e.g., Azure Document Intelligence) with the following parameters:
- Engine: Azure Document Intelligence (prebuilt-read)
- Language: English
- Endpoint: [to be provided by Atticus ops]
- API Key: [to be provided by Atticus ops]
- Output format: plain text with bounding boxes

Apply re-extraction to NAP-SRC-0007 first, then optionally to NAP-SRC-0005.

## Validation Gates
- production_mapping: Ensure re-extracted text is mapped to the correct source_id.
- chain_of_custody: Log the new extraction provenance with engine name, version, and timestamp.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Re-extraction Configuration Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Configure the Azure Document Intelligence prebuilt-read model as the enhanced OCR engine. Set the endpoint and API key from Atticus secrets. Apply re-extraction to source NAP-SRC-0007 (IMG_0304.jpeg). Validate output quality by comparing with the existing Tesseract output. Log the new extraction provenance.
proposed_tasks.title: Configure Azure Document Intelligence for re-extraction of NAP-SRC-0007

risk_flags.text: Low-confidence OCR (0.65) on NAP-SRC-0007 may cause critical payment details to be misread or lost, risking inaccurate evidence interpretation.
Without enhanced OCR re-extraction, the matter may proceed with unreliable text from image-based sources.

summary: Task TASK-003 requests configuration of an enhanced OCR engine for re-extraction. Source NAP-SRC-0007 (IMG_0304.jpeg) was extracted via Tesseract with low confidence (0.65) and shows garbled text, indicating OCR quality is insufficient. Source NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF) was extracted via pdf_text with moderate confidence (0.85) but contains OCR artifacts. No enhanced OCR engine is currently configured. The task is a tool_configuration task; no legal findings are possible from the provided evidence. A drafting note identifies the OCR gap and proposes a follow-up task to configure an enhanced OCR engine (e.g., Azure Document Intelligence) for re-extraction of NAP-SRC-0007.

uncertainties.text: Which enhanced OCR engine (e.g., Azure Document Intelligence, Google Cloud Vision) should be configured is not specified in the work order.
The exact configuration parameters (e.g., language, model version, endpoint) for the enhanced OCR engine are unknown.
Whether the enhanced OCR engine will be applied to NAP-SRC-0005 as well as NAP-SRC-0007 is not specified.
